title: Callaloo and Smoky Sausage Stew
description: A hearty French-inspired stew featuring callaloo and smoky sausage, perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat the Australian olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the smoky sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the callaloo, stew, red wine, and chicken broth to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
